title: HOA Fee Question
scene: 你向物业前台询问管理费账单。

turns.cn: 物业办公室，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我收到物业费涨了，能解释一下吗？
turns.en: I got a notice that HOA fees went up. Can you explain?

turns.cn: 今年电梯维修基金增加了每月二十块。
turns.en: The elevator reserve fund added twenty dollars a month this year.

turns.cn: 有会议纪要可以看吗？
turns.en: Are there meeting minutes I can review?

turns.cn: 在业主网站上下载，上个月已通过。
turns.en: They're on the owner portal. The vote passed last month.

turns.cn: 好的，怎么在线缴费？
turns.en: Okay. How do I pay online?

turns.cn: 登录业主账户，用银行卡即可。
turns.en: Log into your owner account and use a bank card.

title: Noise Complaint to Management
scene: 楼上长期噪音，你向物业投诉。

turns.cn: 我想投诉502长期深夜噪音。
turns.en: I'd like to file a complaint about unit 502. Loud noise late at night.

turns.cn: 什么时候？持续多久了？
turns.en: When does it happen? How long has it been going on?

turns.cn: 几乎每晚十一点后，两周了。
turns.en: Almost every night after eleven. For two weeks.

turns.cn: 我们会发书面警告，请留记录。
turns.en: We'll send a written warning. Please keep a log.

turns.cn: 需要录音吗？
turns.en: Should I record it?

turns.cn: 可以，但注意当地法律。
turns.en: You can, but check local laws on recording.

turns.cn: 希望尽快解决，谢谢。
turns.en: I hope it gets resolved soon. Thank you.

title: Package Room
scene: 你的快递在物业快递室，你去取。

turns.cn: 你好，有我的包裹吗？姓张。
turns.en: Hi, do you have a package for Zhang?

turns.cn: 有几个，请出示证件。
turns.en: A few. May I see your ID?

turns.cn: 这个大箱子是我的，能借小推车吗？
turns.en: This big box is mine. Can I borrow a dolly?

turns.cn: 可以，用完还到门口。
turns.en: Sure. Return it to the entrance when you're done.

turns.cn: 快递室几点关？
turns.en: What time does the package room close?

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日到六点。
turns.en: Nine PM. Six on holidays.

turns.cn: 明白了，谢谢。
turns.en: Got it. Thanks.

title: Parking Permit
scene: 你向物业申请小区停车许可证。

turns.cn: 我想办一张住户停车证。
turns.en: I'd like to get a resident parking permit.

turns.cn: 请填表，附车辆登记和保险复印件。
turns.en: Fill out this form with a copy of registration and insurance.

turns.cn: 访客停车怎么算？
turns.en: What about guest parking?

turns.cn: 访客区两小时免费，超时会被拖。
turns.en: Guest spots are free for two hours. After that, towing is possible.

turns.cn: 地下车位可以另租吗？
turns.en: Can I rent an underground spot separately?

turns.cn: 有等候名单，目前要等两个月。
turns.en: There's a waitlist. About two months right now.

turns.cn: 那我先排队，谢谢。
turns.en: Put me on the list, please. Thanks.

title: Elevator Out of Service
scene: 小区电梯坏了，你询问物业维修进度。

turns.cn: 两部电梯都坏了，老人怎么上楼？
turns.en: Both elevators are down. How are seniors supposed to get upstairs?

turns.cn: 非常抱歉，零件明天到。
turns.en: We're very sorry. Parts arrive tomorrow.

turns.cn: 能开一部消防梯吗？
turns.en: Can you open one service elevator?

turns.cn: 消防梯仅供搬运，需要预约。
turns.en: The freight elevator is for moves by appointment only.

turns.cn: 维修期间有补偿吗？
turns.en: Is there any compensation during the outage?

turns.cn: 董事会讨论中，有更新会通知。
turns.en: The board is discussing it. We'll notify owners with updates.

turns.cn: 希望尽快修好。
turns.en: I hope it's fixed soon.
